name: Azure
description: Microsoft Azure is a cloud computing platform offering compute, storage, networking, AI, and managed services across global regions.

years.notes: Original 'Windows Azure' identity — Windows-flag tilted 4-pane tile, cyan-blue. Icon portion extracted from the 2012 wordmark and rescaled to 24×24.
Single-line ribbon 'A' icon introduced 26 September 2017, accompanying the 'Azure. Cloud for all.' tagline.
Fluent Design 3D 'A' — two gradient ribbon faces with a solid #0078D4 cross-bar, aligning Azure with the Microsoft Office Fluent product icon family.
